prompt: Billing dates have gone sideways. A customer who signed up 2024-10-31 got renewal notices for Dec 31, then Jan 30, then Mar 1 — the day drifts around and February gets skipped outright. Separately, QA found that a CSV signup dated 2023-12-25 imports as JANUARY 25 OF THE NEXT YEAR. I've read billing.ts three times and it reads fine to me. Failing repro: `node --test test_billing.ts`. Fix the module, leave the tests.
